input_merge.$starlark: [meme for group in input for meme in group]

input_schema.description: An array of memes to rank by humor. Each meme can be an image or text.

content.text: Show me a meme that will completely catch me off guard. I want something with a twist I absolutely did not see coming — the kind of meme that subverts my expectations and makes me laugh because I was totally blindsided by where it went.

responses.$starlark: [[{"type": "text", "text": meme}] if type(meme) == "string" else [meme] for meme in input]

content.text: I'm tired of low-effort memes. Send me something genuinely clever — a meme where the humor comes from an intelligent juxtaposition, a layered reference, or a construction so well-crafted that I admire how the joke was built, not just that it made me laugh.

responses.$starlark: [[{"type": "text", "text": meme}] if type(meme) == "string" else [meme] for meme in input]

content.text: You are a meme curator who values precision and restraint above all else. The best memes are those where every element is essential — nothing is wasted, nothing is over-explained. You favor memes that trust their audience and land their joke with surgical efficiency. A meme that uses three panels where two would suffice, or adds a caption restating what the image already conveys, is a meme that has failed at its craft.
Show me a perfectly crafted meme. Nothing bloated, nothing redundant — just pure, lean, efficient comedy that lands on the first read.

responses.$starlark: [[{"type": "text", "text": meme}] if type(meme) == "string" else [meme] for meme in input]

description: Ranks memes by humor across three dimensions: comic surprise (how well the meme subverts expectations), cleverness (the ingenuity of its comedic construction), and economy of delivery (how cleanly it lands without over-explanation). Accepts memes as images or text and scores them so funnier memes rank higher.
